them explicitly. Meta says this and it's a fact that you can prove yourself with audience segments and sales campaigns. Now whether or not remarketing is useful is based in theory. Meta counts a conversion by default when someone clicks your ad and converts within seven days or views your ad without clicking and converts within one day. This is a fact. It's how attribution works. But that click doesn't need to be an outbound click on a link.
